name: Elaine Lopez
title: About Me
tagline: Tech Enthusiast, Music Lover & Problem Solver
blurb:
Hey there, I'm Elaine! 👋 I graduated from UTS with a Bachelors in Computing Science (Honours). 🎓

I have a passion for all things tech, and I've been on an exhilarating journey ever since. Currently, I'm navigating the tech landscape as a Junior Web Developer at Insurance Australia Group (IAG), where each day presents new challenges and opportunities for growth. 🚀

Before diving into the professional realm, I had the privilege of serving as a Head Teacher at Code Camp, where I ignited young minds with the wonders of coding through engaging web and game projects. 👩‍🏫💻

When I'm not knee-deep in code or brainstorming UX/UI concepts, you'll often find me unwinding with the latest binge-worthy TV shows or strumming away on my guitar, piano, or ukulele. 📺🎸🎹

From untangling code knots to crafting harmonious melodies, I thrive on the excitement of problem-solving and creative expression. 🎶💡 Excited to continue pushing boundaries and shaping the future of tech! 🌟
